title: tribrachia recurva
intro: Tribrachia recurva, also known as the recurved tribrachia, is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. It is a shrub that belongs to the family Myoporaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which have been reported to provide health benefits such as relieving asthma symptoms and reducing inflammation.
